name: Cajun Oven-Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 each Thighs, chicken, broiler/ fryer, boned, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, make the marinade by mixing together hot pepper sauce, water, mustard, and pepper. Add chicken; cover and marinate in refrigerator for 1 hour.
2. While chicken is marinating, prepare the coating: In a blender, place breadcrumbs, flour, oil, garlic powder, onion powder, poultry seasoning, cornstarch, salt, sugar, and paprika. Blend until thoroughly mixed.
3. Put the bread crumb mixture in a shallow dish.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and add to the crumb mixture one piece at a time, turning to coat.
5. Place chicken in single layer, in a shallow foil lined baking dish.
6. Bake in 400°F for 20 minutes. Reduce temperature to 350°F and bake for another 20 minutes or until chicken is fork tender.
